title: Stack 67
body:
Items that originally stack to 64 will now stack to 67..... makes your world extremely tuff. 

Highly recommended to use with any mod that adds mangos to the game. 

Installation 📥
- Download the appropiate .jar file for your game version
- From your downloads, place the mods .jar file into your Minecraft mods folder
- Launch Minecraft with the Fabric mod loader, and your server is now tuff asf!


![boi ts mod so tuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fdde84bd99056e800178c94ee061819e3dc36c7.png)
